kb-technologyone.title: Reset your TechnologyOne password
kb-technologyone.content: Use the self-service portal and choose Forgot Password. MFA is required.

kb-technologyone.title: TechnologyOne invoice approval
kb-technologyone.content: Approvers can review pending invoices under Finance > Approvals.

kb-blackboard.title: Blackboard course copy
kb-blackboard.content: Instructors can copy content from existing courses using Course Tools.

kb-dynamics365.title: Dynamics 365 lead qualification
kb-dynamics365.content: Use the Qualify action to convert leads into opportunities.
